author: barnabasbusa
content: as 8045 is CFI-ed, I'd like to ask CL devs that would be looking at implementing 8045 in the coming weeks to please take a look at https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11443. Tldr: exclude slashed validators from all validator duties not just proposing duties. cc <@520034910149410861>

author: potuz
content: Any chance that we can move all spec tests to post Fulu? I want to get rid of all code to make sure we have the right proposer and fail apectests
